title: Checkpoint datapack
body:
Gold Block Checkpoint Datapack

This datapack allows players _in Adventure Mode_ to set a checkpoint simply by stepping on a gold block.

**🛠 Features:**
- Sets the player’s spawnpoint when standing on a gold block.
- Displays a "Checkpoint set" message.
- Uses invisible markers to prevent spam — the checkpoint triggers only once per block, even if you return to it later.
- Lightweight and optimized to run on every tick.

✅ How to Use:
Stand on a gold block while in Adventure mode.
You’ll see a message and your spawnpoint will be updated.
No need for command blocks — just install the datapack!

**Compatible with Minecraft 1.13.x – 1.21.x**
_Soon will be more versions available_ 

**WARNING: if you have any problems with datapack, try /reload and /function checkpoint:init**
